title: Punjab University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: Punjab University has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the Punjab University Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply fr these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are looking ...
